title: Where Is Ada?
synopsis: Baby Ada plays peek-a-boo with her loving family throughout their cozy home. Each page reveals Ada hiding in a new spot while her diverse family members search for her with joy and excitement.

pages.text: Where is Ada? Where can she be?

illustration.description: A warm, sunlit living room with soft peach and cream colors. Ada's mama, a Black woman with natural curly hair in a yellow sweater, looks around with a gentle smile. Ada's papa, a Latino man with kind brown eyes in a blue shirt, peers behind a soft coral armchair. The room has rounded furniture and warm lighting.
illustration.alt: Ada's parents searching for her in a cozy living room

illustration.description: Little Ada, a mixed-race toddler with soft brown curls and bright dark eyes, pops out from behind the coral armchair with a huge giggle-filled smile. Her tiny hands reach up toward the viewer. She wears a mint green romper. Her parents beam with joy in the background, arms outstretched.
illustration.alt: Ada appearing from behind the chair with a big smile

pages.text: Where is Ada? Where can she be?

illustration.description: The sunny kitchen with soft yellow walls and white cabinets. Grandma, an elderly Asian woman with silver hair in a bun wearing a lavender cardigan, opens cabinet doors gently. Big brother Luis, a young Latino boy with dark hair in a red t-shirt, looks under the kitchen table with curiosity.
illustration.alt: Grandma and big brother searching in the kitchen

illustration.description: Ada emerges from inside a lower kitchen cabinet, her arms stretched wide with pure delight. Cookie crumbs dot her cheeks and she has the biggest toothless grin. Grandma and Luis laugh with surprise and joy, their faces full of love and amusement at finding the little explorer.
illustration.alt: Ada popping out of a kitchen cabinet with cookie crumbs

pages.text: Where is Ada? Where can she be?

illustration.description: Ada's bedroom with soft pink and white decor. Uncle Sam, a Black man with glasses and a green sweater, looks behind pastel curtains. Aunt Rosa, a Latina woman with long dark hair in a purple dress, checks near the white crib with colorful mobile overhead.
illustration.alt: Uncle and aunt searching in Ada's bedroom

illustration.description: Ada sits in her toy basket surrounded by soft plush animals and colorful blocks, clapping her little hands together with glee. A stuffed elephant sits on her head like a hat. Uncle Sam and Aunt Rosa point and laugh with pure joy at her adorable hiding spot.
illustration.alt: Ada sitting in her toy basket clapping happily

pages.text: Where is Ada? Where can she be?

illustration.description: The whole diverse family gathers in the living room, all looking around with exaggerated confused expressions. Mama, Papa, Grandma, Luis, Uncle Sam, and Aunt Rosa scratch their heads and peer around with playful worry. The room feels warm and golden with afternoon light streaming through windows.
illustration.alt: The whole family looking confused while searching for Ada

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Here I am! I love you!

illustration.description: Ada runs toward the viewer with arms wide open, her face radiating pure joy and love. The entire family surrounds her with open arms, creating a circle of love. Everyone is laughing and smiling, with warm golden light bathing the scene. Hearts seem to float in the air around them.
illustration.alt: Ada running to the family with arms wide open, everyone embracing

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: Who is hiding in the story?
questions.explanation: Ada is the little girl who hides and plays peek-a-boo!

questions.question: Where does Ada hide in the kitchen?
questions.explanation: Ada hides in the kitchen cabinet and gets cookie crumbs on her face!

questions.question: What does Ada say when she appears?
questions.explanation: Ada says 'Peek-a-boo!' every time she comes out of hiding!

pages.text: Where is ___? Where can she be?
